overview: Devoted Combo is a Modern archetype that leverages exponential mana generation to cast game-ending spells for free. The core engine revolves around untapping Delighted Halfling with Devoted Druid to produce infinite green mana. Once the loop is established, Green Sun's Zenith is cast to search for a zero-mana-cost finisher that dictates the win condition. Success depends on protecting the combo pieces and executing the sequence before opponent interaction can disrupt the timeline.
win_conditions: Generate infinite mana by looping Devoted Druid and Delighted Halfling
Cast Green Sun's Zenith for zero mana to retrieve a zero-mana-cost creature
Activate the retrieved creature's abilities to win via infinite damage, infinite life, or library depletion

keep_criteria: Hands with two or more lands
Hands containing both Devoted Druid and Delighted Halfling
Hands with Green Sun's Zenith and early mana sources
mulligan_criteria: Hands with zero or one land
Hands missing either Druid or Halfling
Hands with only high-cost cards and no combo pieces

early_game: Prioritize playing lands and setting up the Devoted Druid and Delighted Halfling loop
Avoid unnecessary combat to preserve combo pieces
Play cheap spells or ramp cards if available
mid_game: Execute the mana loop once both creatures are on the battlefield
Cast Green Sun's Zenith immediately after generating infinite mana
Search for a zero-mana-cost finisher that matches the matchup
late_game: Activate the finisher's abilities to secure victory
Use excess mana to cast additional spells or protect the board if the combo is interrupted
Transition to a grind game only if the combo is disrupted

key_cards.name: Devoted Druid
key_cards.notes: Play after Delighted Halfling to untap it repeatedly, generating exponential green mana.

key_cards.name: Delighted Halfling
key_cards.notes: Play first to establish a base mana source, then use Devoted Druid to untap it for the infinite mana loop.

key_cards.name: Green Sun's Zenith
key_cards.notes: Cast only after achieving infinite mana to search for a zero-mana-cost creature that provides a win condition.

sequencing_tips: Always play Delighted Halfling before Devoted Druid to ensure the loop can start
Verify you have enough mana to cast both creatures before attempting the loop
Cast Green Sun's Zenith immediately after the loop to avoid opponent interaction
Prioritize finishers that bypass opponent's board state or life total

matchups.advice: Rush the combo on turns three or four before they can apply lethal pressure
Protect your combo pieces and look for windows to go off when their hand is empty
Balance speed with resilience, using infinite mana to cast multiple spells if the combo is interrupted

common_threats: Single-target removal targeting Devoted Druid or Delighted Halfling
Board wipes that clear your combo setup
Counterspells aimed at Green Sun's Zenith
Hand disruption that delays your mana loop
